nasb.text: Little children, make sure no one deceives you; the one who practices righteousness is righteous, just as He is righteous;

esv.text: Little children, let no one deceive you. Whoever practices righteousness is righteous, as he is righteous.

cnv.text: 孩子們，不要受人欺騙，行義的才是義人，正如主是公義的。

ccb.text: 孩子们，不要受人迷惑，要知道行义的才是义人，正如主是公义的。

csbs.text: 孩子们哪，不要让任何人迷惑你们。行义的人是公义的，正如基督是公义的。
